summary.en: All radio and telecommunications terminal equipment sold or imported into Kuwait requires mandatory type approval from CITRA (Communications and Information Technology Regulatory Authority) under the Kuwait Telecommunications Law. A CITRA type approval certificate must be obtained prior to import or sale. The certificate number must appear on the device label and packaging. The GCC Mutual Recognition Arrangement (GCC MRA) exists but CITRA enforces national type approval in practice; CE, FCC, and CCC marks are not accepted as substitutes.
summary.zh: 所有在科威特销售或进口的无线电及电信终端设备，依据科威特《电信法》须取得CITRA（通信与信息技术监管局）的强制型号认证。须在进口或销售前取得CITRA型号认证证书，证书编号须标注于设备标签及包装上。GCC相互承认协议存在，但CITRA在实践中执行国家型号认证；CE、FCC及CCC标志不被接受为替代。
summary.zht: 所有在科威特銷售或進口的無線電及電信終端設備，依據科威特《電信法》須取得CITRA（通信與資訊技術監管局）的強制型號認證。須在進口或銷售前取得CITRA型號認證證書，證書編號須標注於裝置標籤及包裝上。GCC相互承認協議存在，但CITRA在實踐中執行國家型號認證；CE、FCC及CCC標誌不被接受為替代。

standards_or_laws: Kuwait Telecommunications Law (Law No. 37 of 2014 and amendments)
CITRA Type Approval Regulations for Telecommunications Terminal Equipment
GCC Mutual Recognition Arrangement for Telecommunications Terminal Equipment (GCC MRA)

summary.en: China requires MIIT/SRRC radio type approval for wireless devices (radio transmitting equipment license), MIIT network access license (NAL) for telecommunications terminal equipment connecting to public networks, and CCC certification for certain RF-containing products. GB standards (GB/T 22450 series, SRRC radio test standards) form the technical basis.
summary.zh: 中国要求无线设备取得工信部/无线电管理局（SRRC）无线电型号核准（无线电发射设备型号核准证），公共网络接入的电信终端设备取得工信部电信设备进网许可证（NAL），特定含射频产品取得CCC认证。GB标准（GB/T 22450系列、SRRC无线电测试标准）构成技术基础。
summary.zht: 中國要求無線裝置取得工信部/無線電管理局（SRRC）無線電型號核准（無線電發射設備型號核准證），公共網路接入的電信終端設備取得工信部電信設備進網許可證（NAL），特定含射頻產品取得CCC認證。GB標準（GB/T 22450系列、SRRC無線電測試標準）構成技術基礎。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Administrative Measures for Radio Transmitting Equipment Type Approval
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) regulations for telecom terminal equipment
CCC Certification (GB 9254, GB 4943.1 for applicable RF products)

gap.en: SRRC radio type approval, MIIT NAL, and CCC certification are not recognised by CITRA. A separate Kuwait CITRA type approval application must be submitted with compliant test reports (typically ETSI/IEC-based). GCC MRA provides a framework but does not eliminate Kuwait's national CITRA type approval requirement in practice. CE and FCC marks carry no legal weight for Kuwait market entry.
gap.zh: SRRC无线电型号核准、工信部NAL及CCC认证不被CITRA承认。须另行提交科威特CITRA型号认证申请，并附合规测试报告（通常基于ETSI/IEC）。GCC MRA提供框架，但实践中未消除科威特国家CITRA型号认证要求。CE及FCC标志对进入科威特市场不具法律效力。
gap.zht: SRRC無線電型號核准、工信部NAL及CCC認證不被CITRA承認。須另行提交科威特CITRA型號認證申請，並附合規測試報告（通常基於ETSI/IEC）。GCC MRA提供框架，但實踐中未消除科威特國家CITRA型號認證要求。CE及FCC標誌對進入科威特市場不具法律效力。

source.publisher: CITRA — Communications and Information Technology Regulatory Authority, State of Kuwait

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CITRA type approval is mandatory for all radio and telecommunications terminal equipment imported or sold in Kuwait. Chinese SRRC, NAL, and CCC approvals are not substitutes. A full CITRA type approval application with ETSI/IEC-compliant test reports is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] CITRA型号认证对所有在科威特进口或销售的无线电及电信终端设备为强制性要求。中国SRRC、NAL及CCC批准不能替代。须提交附ETSI/IEC合规测试报告的完整CITRA型号认证申请。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] CITRA型號認證對所有在科威特進口或銷售的無線電及電信終端設備為強制性要求。中國SRRC、NAL及CCC批准不能替代。須提交附ETSI/IEC合規測試報告的完整CITRA型號認證申請。
